entry.obeliskdepths.ambushers.flavor: An opening-strike mark made for the first clean hit.
entry.obeliskdepths.ambushers.name: Ambusher's
entry.obeliskdepths.arcane.flavor: A focused sigil that threads magic through the hit.
entry.obeliskdepths.arcane.name: Arcane
entry.obeliskdepths.brutal.flavor: A blunt force mark that pushes every hit harder.
entry.obeliskdepths.brutal.name: Brutal
entry.obeliskdepths.critical_edge.flavor: A tempering mark that rewards clean decisive strikes.
entry.obeliskdepths.critical_edge.name: Critical Edge
entry.obeliskdepths.deadly.flavor: A precise mark that rewards decisive timing.
entry.obeliskdepths.deadly.name: Deadly
entry.obeliskdepths.executioners.flavor: A finishing mark that leans into a weakened enemy.
entry.obeliskdepths.executioners.name: Executioner's
entry.obeliskdepths.fire_edge.flavor: A tempering mark that burns through the weapon edge.
entry.obeliskdepths.fire_edge.name: Fire Edge
entry.obeliskdepths.flameforged.flavor: A furnace-born mark that changes part of the blade's bite.
entry.obeliskdepths.flameforged.name: Flameforged
entry.obeliskdepths.flaming.flavor: A direct ember mark that adds reliable fire damage.
entry.obeliskdepths.flaming.name: Flaming
entry.obeliskdepths.frostbound.flavor: A cold mark that lays winter into the weapon's edge.
entry.obeliskdepths.frostbound.name: Frostbound
entry.obeliskdepths.frostforged.flavor: A pale forge mark that turns impact into chill.
entry.obeliskdepths.frostforged.name: Frostforged
entry.obeliskdepths.giant_slayers.flavor: A hunter's mark built for targets that should not stand.
entry.obeliskdepths.giant_slayers.name: Giant Slayer's
entry.obeliskdepths.impacting.flavor: A concussive mark that adds blunt momentum.
entry.obeliskdepths.impacting.name: Impacting
entry.obeliskdepths.piercing.flavor: A narrow point of force that slips past mitigation.
entry.obeliskdepths.piercing.name: Piercing
entry.obeliskdepths.razor_edged.flavor: A clean edge mark for weapons that solve problems directly.
entry.obeliskdepths.razor_edged.name: Razor Edged
entry.obeliskdepths.smoldering.flavor: A patient heat mark that rewards keeping enemies burning.
entry.obeliskdepths.smoldering.name: Smoldering
entry.obeliskdepths.spellblade.flavor: A blade-and-sigil mark that echoes force as magic.
entry.obeliskdepths.spellblade.name: Spellblade
entry.obeliskdepths.stormcharged.flavor: A charged mark that snaps through the strike.
entry.obeliskdepths.stormcharged.name: Stormcharged
entry.obeliskdepths.stormforged.flavor: A storm mark that turns force into a hard flash.
entry.obeliskdepths.stormforged.name: Stormforged
entry.obeliskdepths.sundering.flavor: A breaker mark that makes armor answer less loudly.
entry.obeliskdepths.sundering.name: Sundering
entry.obeliskdepths.tempered.flavor: A steady strike mark with no fragile condition.
entry.obeliskdepths.tempered.name: Tempered
entry.obeliskdepths.toxic_edge.flavor: A coated-edge mark that makes clean cuts turn toxic.
entry.obeliskdepths.toxic_edge.name: Toxic Edge
entry.obeliskdepths.venomous.flavor: A toxin mark that leaves a bitter cut.
entry.obeliskdepths.venomous.name: Venomous
entry.obeliskdepths.withering.flavor: A fading mark that carries a dry, ruinous bite.
entry.obeliskdepths.withering.name: Withering
message.obeliskdepths.dungeon.boundary_w: You are outside your dungeon boundary.
message.obeliskdepths.dungeon.encounter_: The dungeon encounter failed. Returning you to safety.
message.obeliskdepths.obelisk.inside_dun: Obelisks cannot be used inside the dungeon.
message.obeliskdepths.obelisk.invalid_ob: The obelisk is no longer valid.
message.obeliskdepths.portal.entry.acces: You cannot enter this dungeon portal.
message.obeliskdepths.portal.entry.bound: You are already bound to another dungeon.
message.obeliskdepths.portal.entry.desti: No safe dungeon entry position is available.
message.obeliskdepths.portal.entry.insta: This dungeon is no longer available.
message.obeliskdepths.portal.entry.sessi: This dungeon portal is no longer active.
message.obeliskdepths.portal.entry.wrong: This dungeon portal belongs to another dimension.
message.obeliskdepths.portal.no_anchor: No safe place was found for the dungeon portal.
message.obeliskdepths.portal.no_site: No unreached dungeon site was found nearby.
message.obeliskdepths.portal.opened: Dungeon portal opened. Step into the portal to enter.
message.obeliskdepths.portal.spawn_faile: Failed to create the dungeon portal.
tempering_direction.obeliskdepths.arcane: Magic damage and spellblade-style damage gains.
tempering_direction.obeliskdepths.balanc: Steady weapon tempering with reliable general damage.
tempering_direction.obeliskdepths.echo.d: Echo tempering favors unusual resonance affixes.
tempering_direction.obeliskdepths.edge.d: Physical offense, armor pressure, and finishing power.
Lightning and kinetic damage for forceful strikes.
Poison, wither, and toxic weapon conversion.
